name: Mushroom Scallion Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot.
2. Add the scallions, salt, and white pepper. Sauté for 10 minutes until the onions are softened.
3. Stir in the chicken stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and let simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Cover the pot and continue simmering for another 10 minutes.
5. Add half of the sliced mushrooms and cook for 1 minute.
6. Puree the mixture until smooth using a blender or food processor.
7. Stir in the 15% cream and gently heat the soup until warmed through.
8. Gradually add the remaining sliced mushrooms, cooking slowly until they are tender.
9. Serve with a dollop of whipped cream and garnish with a dash of cayenne (or paprika) for color. Use a warmed bowl to serve.
